statement.headerDoc:
STEP 994 — Dual-Axiom Coexistence Cluster Lean 4 Scaffolding (Rei-AIOS)
  =======================================================================

  Falsifiable test of the Tier 3 claude-discovery dual-axiom-coexistence:
    "ζ regularization 1+2+3+… = -1/12, da Costa paraconsistent logic,
    and Birkhoff-vN quantum logic share a common Lean 4 encoding as
    axiom-conditional polyvalent truth: F : AxiomChoice → Truth with
    F(A₁) ≠ F(A₂) both valid."

  This file provides:
    - abstract structure `PolyvalentTruth`
    - three non-trivial instantiations (ζ / paraconsistent / quantum)
    -
